title: chenopodium vulvaria f. microphyllum
intro: Chenopodium vulvaria f. microphyllum, also known as the lesser wormwood or small wormwood, is a subspecies of the Chenopodium vulvaria plant, a type of flowering plant in the amaranth family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chenopodium vulvaria f. microphyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
